channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [HARRMALAYA] Harrisons Malayalam Ltd Closes Trading Window Until 48 Hours After Q4 Results in 2026
item.description:
Harrisons Malayalam Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives, effective from April 1, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026. The decision is in accordance with the Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Insiders, Code of Practices and Procedure for Fair Disclosure of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information, and SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The date of the board meeting for the review and approval of the audited financial results will be intimated in due course.

  • Harrisons Malayalam Ltd closes trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives from April 1, 2026
  • The closure is in accordance with various codes and regulations
  • The trading window will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of Q4 results for the year ending March 31, 2026
  • The date of the board meeting for review and approval of the audited financial results will be announced later
  • The announcement is in compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HARRISONS MALAYALAM LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RANASUG] Rana Sugars Ltd Trading Window Closed for Insider Trading until 48 hours after FY 2025-26 Board Meeting
item.description:
Rana Sugars Ltd has announced that the trading window for insider trading will be closed from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the Board Meeting scheduled for consideration of Audited Financial Results for the FY 2025-26. The Board Meeting for consideration and declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ending 31st March, 2026 will be intimated in due course.

  • Rana Sugars Ltd trading window closed for insider trading from 1st April, 2026
  • Trading window to remain closed until 48 hours after the FY 2025-26 Board Meeting
  • Board Meeting scheduled for consideration of Audited Financial Results for the FY 2025-26
  • Date of Board Meeting to be intimated in due course
  • Announcement made in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct for Trading by Insiders under SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RANA SUGARS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PARKHOTELS] Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd: Insider Trading Disclosure under SEBI Regulations
item.description:
Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd has received a disclosure from Ms. Indrani Dasgupta Paul, a member of the Promoter Group and an immediate relative of the Promoter, regarding the acquisition of 9,380 equity shares. This represents 0.00440% of the paid-up equity share capital of the company. The transaction was executed on the 24th of March, 2026, on the open market. The shares are fully paid-up and the total value of the transaction is INR 9,94,561.4.

  • Ms. Indrani Dasgupta Paul, a member of the Promoter Group and an immediate relative of the Promoter, has acquired 9,380 equity shares.
  • The acquisition represents 0.00440% of the paid-up equity share capital of the company.
  • The transaction was executed on the 24th of March, 2026, on the open market.
  • The shares are fully paid-up.
  • The total value of the transaction is INR 9,94,561.4.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [ASTONEALAB] Astonea Labs Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window Until After Half-Yearly, Yearly Results in 2026
item.description:
Astonea Labs Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all designated persons, including directors, officers, designated employees, and their immediate relatives. The closure will be in effect from Wednesday, 1st April 2026 until 48 hours after the conclusion of the board meeting convened to consider the financial results for the half-year and year ended 31st March 2026. The exact date of the board meeting will be communicated as per the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Trading window closure for designated persons from 1st April 2026
  • Closure to remain in effect until 48 hours after the board meeting for half-yearly and yearly results in 2026
  • Board meeting date to be communicated as per SEBI regulations
  • Applies to all directors, officers, designated employees, and their immediate relatives

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Astonea Labs Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KKALPANAIND] Trading Window Closed for Kkalpana Industries' Insiders Until After Q4 Results
item.description:
Kkalpana Industries (India) Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for promoters, directors, designated persons, and their immediate relatives. The closure will be effective from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending on March 31, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the Company's Code of Conduct to regulate, monitor, and report trading by insiders, as per the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Trading window closed for Kkalpana Industries' insiders
  • Closure effective from April 1, 2026
  • Will reopen 48 hours after Q4 and FY results declaration
  • In line with the Company's Code of Conduct
  • As per SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kkalpana Industries (India) Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DHUNTEAIND] Dhunseri Tea & Industries Ltd Closes Trading Window from April 1, 2026
item.description:
Dhunseri Tea & Industries Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives. The closure will be in effect from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the announcement of the audited financial results for the financial year ending March 31, 2026. The date of the board meeting where the results will be considered is yet to be announced.

  • Dhunseri Tea & Industries Ltd has closed the trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives.
  • The closure will be in effect from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the announcement of the audited financial results for the financial year ending March 31, 2026.
  • The date of the board meeting for considering the results is yet to be announced.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dhunseri Tea & Industries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NIHARINF] Trading Window Closure for Nihar Info Global Ltd's Q1 2026 Results
item.description:
Nihar Info Global Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives, in accordance with SEBI regulations and the company's Code for Prevention of Insider Trading. The trading window will close on 1st April 2026 and will reopen after 48 hours of the announcement of the financial results for the quarter ending on 31st March 2026. The date of the board meeting to consider and approve the financial results for the quarter ending 31 March 2026 will be intimated separately.

  • Trading window closure for Nihar Info Global Ltd's Q1 2026 results
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI regulations and the company's Code for Prevention of Insider Trading
  • Trading window to close on 1st April 2026
  • Trading window to reopen after 48 hours of Q1 2026 financial results announcement
  • Date of board meeting to consider and approve Q1 2026 financial results to be announced separately

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NIHAR INFO GLOBAL LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BIGBLOC] Bigbloc Construction Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for Designated Persons
item.description:
Bigbloc Construction Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in Equity Shares of the Company by the Designated Persons and their immediate relatives. The closure will be effective from Wednesday, 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ending 31st March, 2026. The decision is in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct for Regulating, Monitoring, Preventing and Reporting of Trading by Designed Persons and their immediate relatives, as framed under the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The date of the Board Meeting for consideration and declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter ending 31st March 2026 is yet to be intimated.

  • Bigbloc Construction Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for Designated Persons and their immediate relatives.
  • The closure will be effective from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ending 31st March, 2026.
  • The decision is in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct for Regulating, Monitoring, Preventing and Reporting of Trading by Designed Persons.
  • The date of the Board Meeting for consideration and declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter ending 31st March 2026 is yet to be intimated.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bigbloc Construction Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MYSTICELE] Mystic Electronics Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for Q4 & FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Mystic Electronics Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for the quarter and financial year ending 31st March, 2026. This closure is in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct for regulating, monitoring and reporting of trading by Designated Persons and their immediate relatives under the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations 2015. The trading window will be closed from Wednesday, 01st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter & year ending 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the consideration and approval of the aforesaid results will be intimated in due course.

  • Trading window closure for Q4 & FY 2025-2026
  • In accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct under SEBI regulations
  • Closure from 01st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of results
  • Date of Board Meeting for result approval to be intimated later
  • Relates to regulating, monitoring, and reporting of trading by Designated Persons and their immediate relatives

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mystic Electronics Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [WILLIMFI] Williamson Financial Services Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window Until After Q4 Results in 2026
item.description:
Williamson Financial Services Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company's Code of Conduct. The trading window will remain closed from April 1, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. This measure is taken to regulate, monitor, and report trading by designated persons in the Company's securities.

  • Trading window closure announced by Williamson Financial Services Ltd
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI regulations and the Company's Code of Conduct
  • To remain closed from April 1, 2026 until 48 hours after Q4 and FY2026 results
  • Mechanism to regulate, monitor, and report trading by designated persons
  • Part of the Company's commitment to transparency and compliance

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WILLIAMSON FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Business Update
